titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 54: The VolleyBall - Break Volley Plus
Simple 1500シリーズ Vol.54 The バレーボール ブレイクバレ プラス

descriptions.text: Break Volley is an indoor volleyball game with cartoon graphics. The game features male and female teams and 12 national teams. The game supports up to four players at once.
